name: Captain Greatsword
description: For a mercenary warband's captain, a greatsword isn't just a weapon but a proof of their rank and combat experience. And if they need to spend some extra gold to make it stand out, then so be it.
descriptionZh: 对于雇佣兵团的团长而言，大剑不仅仅是兵器，也体现了他们的级别和作战经验。有的人还喜欢多花几个钱给自己的宝剑修饰一番。
